sections_cited: sections 3, 4 of the Sindh Child Marriage Restraint Act

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Criminal Bail Application No.185 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATUREs OF JUDGEs For hearing of bail application -------------------------------------------- 06.03.2025 M/s Jawed Ahmed Rajput & Ibad Jawed, advocates for applicants Ms. Seema Zaidi, Additional Prosecutor General Sindh DIGP Mr. Umar Shahid Hamid & Hassan Baloch, DSP Special Branch Mr. Muhammad Riaz Abbasi, advocate for complainant ------------------------------------------- Applicants Mst. Mehwish, Abdul Fayyaz and Noman alias Luqman seeks pre-arrest bail in FIR No.697/2024, registered at P.S. Docks for offence under sections 3, 4 of the Sindh Child Marriage Restraint Act, 2013, after rejection of their bail plea by learned trial Court vide order dated 06.01.2025. 2. On the last date of hearing, applicants/accused Mehwish and Abdul Fayyaz were in attendance and it was submitted by learned counsel for applicants that applicant Noman alias Luqman has been arrested by Docks Police in FIR No.120/2025 for offence under sections 397, 34, PPC. He further submitted that in the background of instant case, complainant has managed false FIR against applicant/accused Noman alias Luqman, therefore, inquiry was entrusted to Mr. Umar Shahid Hamid, DIGP Special Branch, Karachi to conduct inquiry in Crime No.120/2025 and submit his report before this Court. 3. Today, Mr. Umar Shahid Hamid, DIGP Special Branch appeared before this Court and submitted his report, which is taken on record. Perusal of report reveals that there is criminal history of applicant Noman alias Luqman at various police stations of Karachi.

Umar Shahid Hamid, DIGP Special Branch appeared before this Court and submitted his report, which is taken on record. Perusal of report reveals that there is criminal history of applicant Noman alias Luqman at various police stations of Karachi. DIGP has also recorded statements of applicant/accused Noman alias Luqman and various other persons, analyzed CDR and GEO mapping. In the report it is concluded that applicant/accused Noman alias Luqman is involved in FIR No.120/2025, registered at P.S. Docks, Karachi. 4. Learned counsel for complainant submits that custody of applicant Mehwish cannot be handed over to anyone other than her parents on the ground that she is minor. In rebuttal, counsel for applicants submits that applicant Mehwish is sui juris, she has contracted marriage with applicant/accused Noman alias Luqman by exercising her right of freewill and no one can snatch her liberty. Counsel for applicant Mehwish further submits that in compliance of order dated 03.02.2025, passed by Judicial Magistrate-I, Karachi West, Ossification Test of applicant Mehwish was conducted on 04.02.2025, by Women Medico-Legal Officer, Civil Hospital Karachi, in which she has been declared to be of 16 to 17 years of age. Copy of order dated 04.02.2025 as well age certificate has been placed on record. 5. Since this is pre-arrest bail application and this Court has admitted applicant Mehwish to interim pre-arrest bail, this Court in pre-arrest bail cannot decide the issue raised by the learned counsel for complainant, therefore, objection raised by the counsel for complainant is overruled. The alleged offence does not fall within the ambit of prohibitory clause of Section 497, Cr.PC and rule in such cases is bail and its refusal is an exception, as held by apex Court in the case of Muhammad Tanveer versus State (PLD 2017 SC 733). 6. In the view of above, interim pre-arrest bail granted to applicants/accused Mehwish and Abdul Fayyaz by this Court vide order dated 23.01.2025 is hereby confirmed on the same terms and conditions.

The alleged offence does not fall within the ambit of prohibitory clause of Section 497, Cr.PC and rule in such cases is bail and its refusal is an exception, as held by apex Court in the case of Muhammad Tanveer versus State (PLD 2017 SC 733). 6. In the view of above, interim pre-arrest bail granted to applicants/accused Mehwish and Abdul Fayyaz by this Court vide order dated 23.01.2025 is hereby confirmed on the same terms and conditions. Since applicant/accused Noman alias Luqqman has been arrested in FIR No.120/2025 of PS Docks, Karachi and is in custody, therefore, interim pre-arrest bail granted to him is hereby recalled, however, he would be at liberty to move post arrest bail before learned trial Court concerned, which shall be decided on its own merits. 7. Instant criminal bail application is disposed of in the above terms. J U D G E Gulsher/PS
